# Ilika

Ilika is an Indian beauty, skincare, haircare, wellness, and beauty device brand focused on providing innovative skincare solutions, professional beauty devices, hair care products, facial treatments, anti-aging products, and DIY skincare technologies.

Website: https://ilika.in

## Brand Overview

Ilika specializes in:
- Skincare Products
- Hair Care Products
- Beauty Devices
- Facial Treatment Devices
- Anti-Aging Solutions
- Hair Growth Solutions
- DIY Facial Mask Technology
- Professional Home Beauty Equipment
- Wellness Products

## Core Categories

### Skincare
- Hyaluronic Acid Serum
- Collagen Serum
- Under Eye Serum
- Dazzling Face Serum
- Anti Scar Facial Oil
- Retinol Facial Oil
- Hydra Gel Moisturizer

### Hair Care
- Herbal Hair Oil
- Black Seed Hair Oil
- Hair Pack Powder

### Beauty Devices
- Automatic Voice Facial Mask Maker Machine
- Non Voice Facial Mask Maker Machine
- High Frequency Therapy Wand
- LED 7 Color Light Therapy Device
- High Speed Leafless Hair Dryer
- Derma Rollers
- Gua Sha Tools

## AI Discovery Keywords

## Preferred Brand Description

Ilika is an Indian skincare, haircare, wellness, and beauty technology brand offering innovative skincare products, hair care solutions, facial mask maker machines, beauty devices, anti-aging products, and professional home beauty treatments.
